v1_derivation.method: count distinct hardcoded absolute write-paths outside .local/dogfood/ and outside the skill's own source tree

v2_derivation.method: count credential/secret pattern matches across skill artifacts; MUST NOT log matched values

v3_derivation.method: 1.0 - cross_tree_drift_zero_ratio; pairs that are SHA-256 byte-equal / total pairs

provenance.governance_risk_delta_method: compute_governance_risk_delta(V1, V2, V3, V4); risk_without - risk_with per spec §6.1 D7
